product_overview: A public marketing site for Transmeet that presents service information and collects leads via contact/BTP forms. Visitors can submit enquiries which are persisted to the site's lead API and acknowledged with an on-screen confirmation.
core_goals: Learn about Transmeet's services and view marketing pages
Submit inquiries or leads using the public contact/BTP forms
Receive immediate acknowledgement that a submitted lead was received

features.name: Contact and lead form submission
features.description: Public visitors can submit contact or BTP enquiries by filling a simple lead form (name, email, phone, subject, message). The form sends a JSON payload to the app API and shows a success confirmation when the lead is saved.
user_flows: Open /contact -> Fill name, email, phone, subject, message fields -> Submit form -> See success message when lead is saved
Open /contact -> Fill name, email, phone, subject, message fields with valid data -> Submit form -> See success message when lead is saved
Open /contact -> Fill form with missing required field(s) or invalid email/phone -> Submit form -> See validation error indicating required/invalid fields

routes.description: POST JSON lead payloads (contact, BTP, expediteur forms)

features.name: Contact and lead form submission
features.description: Public forms submit JSON to POST /api/leads via submitLead; persists lead and optional Resend email
user_interactions: Fill name, email, phone, subject, message fields
See success message when lead is saved

features.name: Registration email OTP
features.description: User enters email and profile data; Supabase sends OTP email; user verifies on /register/verify
user_interactions: Fill registration form with email and role
Navigate to verify page and enter 6-digit code

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase Auth signInWithOtp (client SDK, not REST in app)

known_limitations.issue: Some dashboard pages are placeholders or mock data
known_limitations.impact: Admin flows may not reflect full backend state
